scripts.dev: concurrently -n client,server -c cyan,green "npm run dev -w client" "npm run dev -w server"
scripts.build: npm run build -w client && npm run build -w server
scripts.build:desktop: npm run build -w client && npm run bundle
scripts.electron:dev: concurrently -k -n vite,server,electron -c cyan,green,magenta "npm run dev -w client" "npm run dev -w server" "node scripts/wait-and-launch.mjs"
